name: Taichu Plugin Marketplace
description: Official plugin registry for Taichu CMS

plugins.name: @taichu/plugin-seo
plugins.description: 自动生成 meta tags、OG 标签、结构化数据，提升搜索引擎可见性
plugins.author: Taichu Team

plugins.name: @taichu/plugin-sitemap
plugins.description: 自动生成 XML sitemap，提交至 Google/Bing 搜索引擎
plugins.author: Taichu Team

plugins.name: @taichu/plugin-analytics
plugins.description: 集成 Google Analytics、百度统计等分析工具到前端主题
plugins.author: Taichu Team

plugins.name: @taichu/plugin-comments
plugins.description: 评论系统集成：支持 Giscus、Disqus、Waline 等多种评论引擎
plugins.author: Taichu Team

plugins.name: @taichu/plugin-ai-writer
plugins.description: AI 写作助手：接入 OpenAI/Claude 等 LLM，辅助内容创作与优化
plugins.author: Taichu Team

plugins.name: @taichu/plugin-image-optimizer
plugins.description: 图片自动优化：上传时自动压缩、转 WebP、生成响应式尺寸
plugins.author: Taichu Team

plugins.name: @taichu/plugin-i18n
plugins.description: 多语言内容管理：翻译工作流、语言切换、URL 本地化
plugins.author: Taichu Team
